strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with expertise across multiple languages and technologies (e.g., TypeScript, D, Java, C++)
Demonstrated leadership and entrepreneurship through founding GISCollective and contributing to open-source projects
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq, including MCP and developer tooling for agentic workflows
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms built from scratch
No PhD or advanced AI-related degree, which is preferred for this role
Lacks recent experience in cloud technologies or large-scale AI platform strategy (current role is more general full-stack)
response.justification: Bogdan has a strong technical foundation with diverse engineering experience and entrepreneurial drive, but his profile lacks the depth and focus on AI/ML and cloud strategy required for a Director-level AI Strategy role. While his recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, there is insufficient evidence of recognized AI expertise or strategic leadership in large-scale cloud/AI platform development.
